言灵师大佬凌染意外穿书末世，对于新世界，她很感兴趣。
面对丧尸围攻
凌染：神说，我会飞。
异能者们看着那人明明没有翅膀，却双脚离地，腾空而起，缓缓张大了嘴巴。
面对要去拿研究资料，异能者们束手无策之时
凌染：神说，我会隐身。
异能者们看着凭空消失的凌染，没一会儿就把那份研究资料从丧尸间里带了出来。
异能者们：凌神这是什么异能？飞行、隐身双系异能？
后来他们才知道，什么双系异能？明明是言出法随。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5ea82b7bd5f6f1fb81b5b614e651bf52","author":"辣鸡的uncle","author_id":"","book_id":"7343521552446540824","book_name":"末世：你惹她干嘛，她开挂了","book_short_name":"神降末世","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7343521556384989720","read_count":"76868","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"912390"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"660","tags":"科幻末世,穿越,末世,穿书,无CP,大佬,天灾,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5b1c6405268c417bff5defe8df4f3609~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779431568&x-signature=ldqeGNs2IwZ7Kq%2BI0Ht6iiomGXE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"84593526228","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"207"},"log_
